LanguageData.VQE_BroadcasterModeDesc_Work: Autobroadcaster plays energetic music that makes everyone work a little bit harder.
LanguageData.VQE_BroadcasterModeDesc_Relax: Autobroadcaster plays soothing music that makes everyone a little bit more relaxed.
LanguageData.VQE_BroadcasterModeDesc_Recruitment: Autobroadcaster plays propaganda messages aimed at prisoners with the purpose of lowering their resistance.
LanguageData.VQE_BroadcasterModeDesc_Conversion: Autobroadcaster plays ideological rhetoric aimed at prisoners with the purpose of lowering their certainty.
LanguageData.VQE_ReactivateDesc: Reactivate the drone. A colonist will need to approach the drone and flick it back on.
LanguageData.VQE_EnterStandbyDesc: Initiate the stand-by mode. The drone will turn off, reducing the lifespan loss by 90%. It will not respond to any tasks or damage, and will need to be reactivated before it can engage again.
LanguageData.VQE_CannotUseConnectionTimedOut: Cannot use while connection timed out
LanguageData.VQE_HardcrashLetterDesc:
{DRONE} is undergoing the hardcrash malfunction.

It will try to clear sensor obstruction by repeatedly crashing into buildings and furniture, potentially destroying them in the process.

This has occurred because {DRONE} is reaching the end of its lifespan.
LanguageData.VQE_KillswitchLetterDesc:
{DRONE} is undergoing the killswitch malfunction.

It will attack anyone that gets close to it.

This has occurred because {DRONE} is reaching the end of its lifespan.
LanguageData.VQE_SelfDecommissionLetterDesc:
{DRONE} is undergoing the self-decommission malfunction.

It has determined that its service life has ended and will ignore all commands as it leaves the local area to shut down somewhere in the wild.

This has occurred because {DRONE} is reaching the end of its lifespan.
LanguageData.VQE_DroneMalfunction_Death: , after which it will cease to work.
LanguageData.VQE_IndexingLetterDesc:
{DRONE} is undergoing the indexing malfunction.

It will study another drone, or another colonist if drones are not present, and will code a special schematic onto a drone core. After the malfunction passes, a drone core will be produced. It can be decoded to permanently unlock a new drone type.

This has occurred because {DRONE} is programmed to undergo indexing malfunctions from time to time.
LanguageData.VQE_DecryptCore: Decrypt {0} to unlock a new drone recipe
LanguageData.VQE_CoreDecryptedDesc: Decoding the drone core unlocked a new drone schematic. From now on, you can craft the following drone type: {0}.\n\n{1}.
LanguageData.VQE_NoUnlockableRecipes: There are no more drone recipes left to decrypt!
LanguageData.VQE_TransmitterRadiusDesc: The radius around a transmitter in which drones that need it will be able to operate. 15 tiles by default (actually 14.9 due to the way the game works).
LanguageData.VQE_LifespanMultiplierModOptions: Drone lifespan multiplier in mod settings: {0}
LanguageData.VQE_LifespanMultiplierDesc: A multiplier on the lifespan of drones. For example, a value of x2 will double the lifespan of all drones. Bear in mind this will not change the current lifespan of already built drones.
LanguageData.VQE_ConsumeLifespanOnRepairDesc: When enabled, repairing drones will consume their lifespan. Disable to prevent lifespan drain during repairs.
LanguageData.VQE_DroneStockpileRaidDesc:
Combat drones from the nearby drone stockpile have arrived nearby.

They are attacking immediately.

Destroy the drone stockpile to stop the drones from attacking you.
LanguageData.VQE_JumpToDroneTransmitter: Click to jump to the drone transmitter
